items.title: Every Hardware Protocol Explained in 6 Minutes
items.description: This video introduces various communication protocols including UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, RS232, and 1-Wire, illustrating their basic connections and applications. It highlights the simplicity of UART with its two-wire system and asynchronous serial communication, contrasting it with other protocols through diagrams and real-world examples like vehicle interiors. For anyone interested in electronics basics and understanding how communication works between devices, this protocol breakdown explains the fundamentals.
